subject: feat(debug): add debugGetEntries export for one-shot buffer reads
body:
The entries array was module-private with no direct read accessor.
Consumers had to subscribe (with replay) to read current state.
Add debugGetEntries() that returns a shallow copy — useful for
one-shot snapshots, testing, and external tooling.

Tags: debug, api
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system-completion
Semver: patch
